title: erigeron utahensis var. tetrapleuris
intro: Erigeron utahensis var. tetrapleuris, also known as Utah fleabane, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the western United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Erigeron utahensis var. tetrapleuris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. Erigeron utahensis var. tetrapleuris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine.
